default.body: A Card groups related content and actions into a single, scannable surface.

variants.label: Elevated
variants.description: Surface with drop shadow — primary container style

variants.label: Outlined
variants.description: Surface with visible border, no shadow

variants.label: Filled
variants.description: Muted background, no border or shadow

header.title: This is an extremely long card title that should truncate gracefully without breaking layout
header.description: Description also has a long string that tests the clamp behaviour when text overflows

no_footer.body: This card has no footer section.

no_header.body: This card has no header — body content fills the top.

rich_content.body: Card body can contain any React children — lists, images, forms, other atoms.
